race.description: Country Music Raceday On Sale Now (Bm70) Hcp
race.comment: Cannot rule too many of these out. TORNADO EXPRESS (5) settled midfield then displayed a nice change of gears to get the prize last start over 1200m at this track. Carries just 0.5kgs more after the claim in similar company. Small query at the trip but the last run suggests he needs it now. ELECTRIC ARROW (11) continued her strong run of recent form when she chased home a potential stakes horse in Balance The Books over 1200m at the Sunshine Coast a fortnight ago. Unproven beyond 1200m but the manner of the close last time says she will run it out. MOONAN QUARTZ (6) made it two from two this prep when he led all the way for a soft win over 1400m at Eagle Farm recently. Certainly ready to tackle Saturday company now. CONTILDA'S LOVE (7) had a six-week break before an eye-catching effort behind TORNADO EXPRESS here last start. Fitter and can close the gap considerably over a longer journey today. MIRRA IMPACT (1) is up in class but was impressive first-up at Toowoomba.
